subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned thy face towards the Most Exalted Horizon! Hearken unto the Call from the Lote-Tree of divine knowledge, planted in the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المقبل الی الافق الاعلی اسمع الندآء من سدره العرفان المغرسه فی ارض
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
